info.title: Traigent Guided Generation Routes
info.description: Session-based routes that issue an opaque GuidancePlan and ingest content-free generation results. The plan conveys selection (seed, action, coarse priority) but no proprietary tuning signals.

post.summary: Request a GuidancePlan for a session
post.description: Returns a deterministic, opaque GuidancePlan derived server-side from proprietary tuning signals. The response carries selection only — no signal names, values, or formulas.

403.description: Feature not enabled for this tenant, or insufficient permissions.

404.description: Session not found for the canonical tenant context.

post.summary: Submit content-free generation results for a GuidancePlan
post.description: Reports per-seed generation counts and deterministic new-example ids for a previously issued plan. Carries no prompt text or example content. The plan_token is echoed back for verification.

403.description: Feature not enabled for this tenant, or insufficient permissions.

404.description: Session or plan not found for the canonical tenant context.

409.description: plan_token invalid, expired, or does not match the session.
